The original 'Apple Inc.' hallucination data was thoroughly eliminated. Tracing its historical names reveals multiple strategic pivots and relocations: it morphed from 'Shanghai Tengyu Brand Management' to 'Shanghai Tengyu Automotive Technology', and finally relocated to Suqian City, Jiangsu Province, under its current optoelectronics moniker. Despite its official registration as a 'Manufacturing' entity in the electronic components sector, concrete evidence contradicts this: its registered address is an apartment/commercial office (Room 1204, Wanda Plaza) rather than an industrial plant, its paid-in capital is a meager 400,000 RMB, and its 2024 insured workforce is 0. This entity is conclusively identified as a highly diversified e-commerce or general trading shell, devoid of any physical manufacturing operations.
